programme.title: Calvary
programme.desc: In this compelling drama, a compassionate priest and estranged father confronts his own demons as he senses the menacing forces of his scornful parish closing in around him.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: A young Irish woman travels to 1950s Brooklyn and falls in love with her new life, until a family tragedy forces her to choose between the two countries and the people in them.

programme.desc: A tycoon's wife who falls for his protege before the Great War must endure an agonising wait to have him back.

programme.desc: When a middle-aged carpenter suffers a heart attack, he struggles as he must work his way through the bureaucratic world of welfare.

programme.title: The Shadow of Violence
programme.desc: In rural Ireland, an ex-boxer who has an autistic son and is the feared enforcer for a drug-dealing family has his loyalties tested when he's asked to kill for the first time.

programme.desc: Doug and Abi take their three children on a trip to Scotland for a big family gathering. They are in the midst of a difficult divorce, and have asked the kids to keep it a secret from their family.

programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric grief stricken mourners.

programme.desc: Meet David before Bowie, one of the greatest icons in music history. But who was the young man behind the many faces?

programme.desc: An Indian girl born in England disobeys her strict family in search of a dream: becoming a soccer star like her idol, David Beckham.

programme.desc: One night, four cases. Grissom and Brass get a stolen hummer and a taco stand. Warrick gets a dead car show girl. Sara and Greg get a dead bodybuilder. Nick gets a dead boy found on a bench.

programme.desc: Brass travels to Hollywood, California to try to track down his estranged daughter's friend, meanwhile trying to rekindle some kind of relationship with her.

programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the brutal murder of an inmate at a locked-down state mental hospital.

programme.desc: A mother reports her son missing and the investigation quickly focuses on a suspicious man seen in the park. But what appears to be is not, and Catherine finds herself face-to-face with a modern day Medea.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop turns into a shoot-out through the streets of Vegas, leaving a string of dead bodies including a rookie cop.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a young girl's boyfriend is found dead, the CSIs go after her string of ex-boyfriends and suspicious mother to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a waiter is gunned down at a glitzy Vegas party, the CSIs postulate that the waiter was trying to murder the hostess. And, an ageing Vegas dancer and socialite.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs track down an ex-con who lets his lifetime of crime catch up with him when he tries to settle an old score, accidentally killing an innocent young girl and destroying the new life he had built.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When Lady Heather's daughter is found dead, Grissom and the CSI team are led into a twisted world of medical experimentation conducted by a crazed, Nazi-sympathising pseudo-scientist.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A romantic evening ends abruptly when a dead body is found in the chimney of an ageing bachelor's house. Sara, Nick and Brass are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Reality television and the all-too-real world of crime scene investigation combine when a young woman is found drugged and sexually assaulted in the hallway of her high rise apartment building.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a 17-year-old homecoming queen is found dead, wrapped in a shower curtain and dumped on the football field, the CSIs go back to school to search for suspects.

programme.desc: When a psychic is murdered at her occult shop, Grissom, Greg and Warrick examine the excessive amount of clues.

programme.title: Absence of Malice
programme.desc: When a prosecutor leaks a false story that a liquor warehouse owner is involved in the murder of an union head, the man's life begins to unravel.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is called upon once again to help a most unconventional neighbour. He is accused of murdering his former partner with one of his inventions.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF team infiltrates a revolutionary group which commits robberies to finance plans to overthrow the American government.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: After the Enterprise landing party beams down to investigate a geologically interesting planet, their ship is hurled across the galaxy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two children escape their bickering parents through a portal in the bottom of their swimming pool to a magical land watched over by a kind old woman the children call Aunt T.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan sets Klink up with a female agent to deliver secret documents, but ends up sending Schultz when Klink is sent with the wrong ones.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye is one word away from his first-ever crossword puzzle completion. When he enlists the help of another unit surgeon, who arrives with the admiral, he must get himself out of big trouble.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Cho Lin of the 4077 is playing Kim Iouki of the 8063 in ping-pong. Later, Cho brings a young Korean who he plans to marry - but he needs the unit's help.

programme.title: Jeopardy!

programme.title: Dad's Army

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a few days a comet would collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is underway.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an all-American girls' professional baseball league formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: An ex-fighter pilot who is afraid to fly is forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin vows to avenge his father's death when he is murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Houston, we have a problem - a fuel leak that threatens to doom three astronauts in space during NASA's 1970 moon mission.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Sudden death takes on a whole new meaning in this suspenseful action tale where a retired fire-fighter's daughter gets caught up in a terrorist's plan to blow up 17,000 hockey fans.

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: Montgomery Brewster is a minor league baseball pitcher who discovers he has to blow $30 million in 30 days as a condition to inherit a much greater fortune.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: A morbidly obese professor becomes a Casanova when he takes a miracle weight-loss potion.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor II: The Klumps
programme.desc: Sherman Klump's getting married but his alter-ego, Buddy Love, is a problem. He steals Sherman's fountain of youth formula and tangles with the whole Klump family.

programme.title: Bowfinger
programme.desc: Hollywood's hottest star turns down a hack producer for his new movie, so he is lured into a series of bizarre scenes that secretly film his every move.

programme.desc: An eccentric chemistry professor discovers an elixir which turns him into a pop idol.

programme.desc: A Special Operations veteran is now into peace, serenity and non-violence. But when Trautman is held by the Soviets and interrogated, the CIA can do nothing and Rambo must come to his aid.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: With his CIA days behind him, Jack Ryan is on vacation when he foils an assassination attempt on the royal family. An enraged IRA splinter faction targets him and his family in revenge.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Wealthy hunters pay for the right to stalk and kill the most challenging prey of them all: man.

programme.title: Barbarella

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: K-9
programme.desc: Thomas Dooley is an unorthodox narcotics cop who teams with an independently minded police dog in this hilarious action-comedy.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is called into action when a prominent businessman, who may be connected to Colombian drug cartels, is murdered.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Animal House
programme.desc: This raunchy, screwball comedy offers a relentless spoof of 1960s college life by following the hilarious adventures of the Delta fraternity.

programme.title: Seinfeld

programme.title: Seinfeld

programme.title: Seinfeld

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George does the opposite of everything he would normally do and turns his life around. Guest stars Dedee Pfeiffer.

programme.title: Seinfeld

programme.desc: A neighbourly rabbi with a cable show ends Elaine's dog trouble. Kramer's role in the dog napping rattles him. George decides to postpone his engagement.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George buckles under pressure with Susan. Maestro boasts about a rental in Tuscany, sending Jerry down a research rabbit hole.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine dates the man from her wake up service who adores dogs. Grapefruit pulp in George's eye sparks chaos when his winks are misread.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George picks up a bad habit from some baseball officials. Elaine has a runner as a house guest during the New York City Marathon, while Kramer gets a jacuzzi.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George and Elaine tire of Jerry's sweet talk. Elaine slips up before the Soup Nazi and is banned from his stall for a year.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George guards his ATM code from Susan. Elaine is baffled when a man remembers a party in detail but not her.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine invites Susan to a clothing exhibition, which worries Kramer. Jerry befriends his pool guy and cannot shake him.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Finding out that her favoured method of birth control is only available in a limited supply, Elaine must decide if her boyfriend is worthy.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer backs the reopening of an old theatre and watches over a fragile friend. Lloyd's Chinese gum becomes an obsession.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine dates a saxophonist she deems sponge worthy, though he will not do everything. Jerry blabs to a bandmate.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer bonds with a caddy who sharpens his golf game. George's bosses eye a promotion when they think he works earlier and later than everyone.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine strains her neck reaching for a bike, then offers it to whoever fixes her. Susan's cousin gives her baby the name George had saved for his first child.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry surprises his parents by buying them a new car. George reconsiders his engagement when a friend of Elaine tells him that she could have set him up with actress Marisa Tomei.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George's fixation on Marisa alarms Susan. Elaine rings Jerry in Florida wanting to join him. Elaine gets Marisa's number so George can claim an alibi.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Pre trip tests show traces of opium, so Peterman fires Elaine. Jerry's parents linger in New York while waiting to move back to Florida.

programme.desc: George is happy because his wedding is delayed three months and excited because Jerry is going to go out with Susan's best friend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry uses Elaine to prove a clerk wrong about an expensive jacket, and the clerk asks her out. George hosts an unwanted wig master from a Broadway musical.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Sharing a calzone makes George Steinbrenner's pet. Kramer raves about clothes straight from the dryer. Jerry thinks Elaine's boyfriend is dating her without asking.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George doesn't hear the details on a project that Wilhelm wants him to champion. Peterman wants Elaine to bid on some golf clubs at an auction and gets into a bidding war.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Wilhelm is delighted with the job George did on the project. The detective on the case thinks he's found Jerry's car, damaged beyond recognition.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After George's off hand remark, Jerry and Elaine await a couple's split. Elaine debuts a new hairdo and resumes driving, which makes Jerry carsick.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: With the wedding nearing, George and Susan order invitations. Jerry meets Jeannie, his female counterpart, after nearly geting hit by a car..

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George tries to put Susan behind him, Elaine is given control of J Peterman's business.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is suspected of killing his own fiancee, while Kramer falls for Jerry's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine meets three friends who are the exact opposite of Jerry, George and Kramer. Then, George uses Susan's death to attract women.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's strange dancing kills staff respect. George cultivates a bad boy image. Jerry becomes an underground legend after bootlegging a new movie.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George tries to woo a photo clerk with pictures of himself. Elaine's reputation blocks treatment. Kramer offers to secure a refund for Jerry's busted stereo.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's promotion of a mail room clerk sparks a mutiny, Jerry discovers his girlfriend's mother is dating Bania, and Kramer brings Frank out of retirement to cook.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's fame in Japan endears Kramer to a group of tourists and inspires George to revive their TV pilot.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As a restaurant's bright lights keep Kramer awake, Elaine's job is threatened after she buys George an expensive hat on the company's account.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While abstinence makes George smarter, it has the opposite effect on Elaine. Kramer opens a smoker's lounge in his apartment as Jerry prepares to speak at a junior high school.

programme.desc: George squares off against a shipwreck survivor over a new apartment. Meanwhile, Jerry attempts to help Newman get a much sought-after transfer to Hawaii.

programme.title: Direct Talk

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Inoue Hiroko is the president of an NGO that has been running exchange programs for young people from Israel, Palestine, and Japan for 20 years. She talks about their goals and her hope for peace.

programme.title: MATSURI: The Heartbeat of Japan
programme.desc: The Kawanishi Dainenbutsu Kenbai dance tells the story of restless souls being guided to the Pure Land by the Buddha, in the form of a monkey. In 2022, it became UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: In the Edo period, childbirth was a community affair, with the mother-to-be attended by a midwife and the women in her life. It was also characterized by unique customs and superstitions.

programme.title: Biz Stream
programme.desc: This episode focuses on how precision engineering and selective breeding are being used to reduce pollen and bring relief to millions of hay fever sufferers.

programme.title: Frontrunners
programme.desc: Fukuoka's summer festival, Hakata Gion Yamakasa, features huge floats decorated with elaborate dolls. We meet Nakamura Hiromine, a fourth-generation doll maker fusing this tradition with modern ideas.

programme.title: Totally Timeless
programme.desc: The ultimate mix of guitar-driven anthems and singalong favourites. From soaring choruses to easy rock staples, these are the tracks that never go out of style.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: A young man who escapes the clutches of a murderous hitchhiker is subsequently stalked by the hitcher and framed for his crimes.

programme.title: The Stunt man
programme.desc: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

programme.title: Pusher
programme.desc: A failed drug deal lands petty criminal Frank in debt to a ruthless and dangerous Copenhagen drug lord.

programme.title: Pusher 2: With Blood on My Hands
programme.desc: In part two of Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy, Mads Mikkelsen plays Tonny, a criminal at the mercy of his cold-hearted gangster father.

programme.title: Pusher 3: I'm The Angel of Death
programme.desc: This bloody and captivating film completes Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy. Copenhagen's biggest kingpin must rethink his status when a younger crowd rolls in.

programme.title: Corrective Measures
programme.desc: When a powerless new inmate arrives at a prison for supervillains, he must choose his friends wisely, or become a pawn in the deadly game between the Warden and The Lobe.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: Children of the Corn III: Urban Harvest
programme.desc: Act three in the horror series based on a Stephen King story. Two brothers are adopted by a family. Deadly occurrences follow, amid revelations that one boy was in a bizarre cult in Nebraska.

programme.title: Prisoners Of The Ghostland
programme.desc: In the treacherous frontier city of Samurai Town, a notorious criminal must break an evil curse in order to rescue an abducted girl who has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious labyrinth-like neighbourhood of identical houses.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: After being contacted by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: USA in the 1970s. We follow the highly intelligent Jack over a span of 12 years and are introduced to the murders that define his development as a serial killer.

programme.title: Cypher
programme.desc: Paranoia drives this hi-tech cyber thriller when a computer programmer who turns to corporate espionage is caught in a spiral where even his own identity is put in doubt.

programme.title: Audition
programme.desc: A widower accepts his friend's offer to audition girls in order to search for his new wife. However, the girl he likes does not appear to be the one she claims to be.

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: A reluctant IRA agent discovers that some people just aren't who you expect them to be.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: An enthusiastic young adventurer follows his dreams into the Amazon jungle with two friends and a guide with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: The story of a teenager who struggles through school and family life by escaping into a fantasy world of magic and monsters.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros.
programme.desc: Two Brooklyn plumbers, Mario and Luigi, must travel to another dimension to rescue a princess from the evil dictator King Koopa and stop him from taking over the world.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Two gunrunners and a pregnant policewoman (Tracy Scoggins) are trapped in a warehouse with a bad boy's toys.

programme.title: Demonic Toys: Personal Demons
programme.desc: A group of people on a world wide search for oddities find themselves trapped in a nine hundred year old Italian castle when they accidently unleash the Demonic Toys.

programme.title: Beyond Re-Animator
programme.desc: The imprisoned Dr West continues his gruesome experiments with the aid of the new jailhouse physician.

programme.title: A Bittersweet Life
programme.desc: A gangster starts a violent feud after he refuses to kill his boss's cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: In an America ravaged by atomic warfare, nomads spend their days scavenging for scrap. That's how an ex-soldier acquires spare android parts, which turn into a robot programmed to destroy humans.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Nomi Malone has what it takes to make it as a Las Vegas showgirl - what she doesn't have is a way in. To survive, she accepts the only job available, lap dancing at a seedy club.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: Chan Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, months after the first film, Ming suspects a superintendent is a triad mole, while years earlier, Yan undertakes his first mission. (Subtitles).

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: An employee of a floral shop hangs himself when a colleague goes to his apartment to investigate his absence from work.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave
programme.desc: An aspiring writer is sexually abused and left for dead by four men. She systematically hunts them down to seek revenge, inflicting upon them every horrifying and torturous moment they carried out on her.

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: Amulet
programme.desc: An ex-soldier is offered a place to stay at a decaying house inhabited by a young woman and her dying mother. Falling for her, he suspects something sinister is going on.

programme.title: Suspiria
programme.desc: A girl enrols in an upmarket ballet academy, only to realise that the school is a front for something much more sinister and supernatural.

programme.title: The Science of Sleep
programme.desc: A man entranced by his dreams and imagination is love-struck with a French woman and feels he can show her his world.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: After a shooting incident at the North-South Korean border DMZ leaves two North Korean soldiers dead, a neutral Swiss and Swedish team investigates what actually happened.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: In the misty forests of North America, a family of Sasquatches find themselves on a collision course with the ever-changing world around them.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: A bedridden stuntman entrances a little girl with tales of exotic heroes. As his health reaches the point of peril so does the story he's telling, with dramatic consequences. An epic fantasy.

programme.title: Color Out Of Space
programme.desc: A family's retreat to rural life quickly crumbles when a meteorite crashes into their front yard. They attempt to battle a nebulous entity that they can barely understand.

programme.title: District B13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: District B13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Explosive sequel set in a futuristic Paris. Corrupt cops conspire to launch a nuclear strike and take over a ghetto terrorised by marauding drug gangs and killers. Subtitles.

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War
programme.desc: A Yakuza group from Osaka with dreams of national dominance moves into the snowy Hokuriku region, sparking a bloody turf war with local gangs.

programme.title: Howling IV: The Original Nightmare
programme.desc: A successful author moves to a small town after suffering a mental breakdown and is tormented by demons and werewolves.

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: Coming Home In The Dark
programme.desc: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

programme.title: House of the Devil
programme.desc: Financially struggling college student Samantha takes a strange babysitting job that coincides with a full lunar eclipse. She slowly realizes her clients harbor a terrifying secret.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Sole-survivor of a plane crash, and stranded deep within the Arctic Circle, Overgard is waiting to be rescued, when a sudden turn of events finds him no longer on his own.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: Following
programme.desc: A young London writer follows strangers for inspiration, but his hobby becomes an obsession, leading him further into their lives than he ever intended.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Apex
programme.desc: A group of elite hunters pay to hunt down a man on a deserted island, only to find themselves becoming the prey.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: What Lies Below
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl returns home from camp and learns her mother has a new boyfriend, one she intends to marry; a man whose charm, intelligence and beauty make him look like he's not human at all.

programme.title: The Wild Goose Lake
programme.desc: On the run, gangster Zhou connects with sex worker Liu Aiai who was instructed to bring him in.

programme.title: Hellraiser IV: Bloodline
programme.desc: In the 22nd century, a scientist attempts to right the wrong his ancestor created: the puzzle box that opens the gates of Hell and unleashes Pinhead and his Cenobite legions.

programme.title: Howling V: The Rebirth
programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: After being contacted by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

programme.title: Hell House LLC
programme.desc: Five years after 15 people were killed during a haunted house tour, a documentary crew visits the scene to investigate what really happened.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: Lizzy is settling a remote stretch of land on the 19th-century American frontier, when she begins to sense a sinister presence that seems to be borne of the land itself.

programme.title: The Holy Mountain
programme.desc: A Mexican master (Alexandro Jodorowsky) leads a Christ figure (Horacio Salinas) and other disciples to a mountain of immortal wise men.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: When dangerous criminals on a cargo ship are transported from the Phillipines to South Korea, they unleash a sinister force after an escape attempt leads to a riot. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A former New York family court judge, Judge Judy acts as a true moral compass for people seeking guidance, resolution and a little common sense.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A former New York family court judge, Judge Judy acts as a true moral compass for people seeking guidance, resolution and a little common sense.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: Every day, 20,000 passengers enter Canada through Vancouver Airport. Phoney tourists, drug toys, aggressive visitors and weapon-phones keep security on constant alert.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: A passenger with narcotics-laden bags denies ownership. Immigration separate young lovers. A singing Indian poet has more wallets than cash. Suspicious mail contains narcotics.

programme.title: Police Ten 7
programme.desc: In New Zealand, the term 'Police Ten 7' means 'Police have arrived on the scene'. This unique fly-on-the-wall reality series brims with action as it follows urban cops on the beat.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A young unlicensed driver's mobile phone gets him in trouble. Police are concerned for the safety of an unrestrained child in an unroadworthy car that they pull over for a licence check.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies halt a burglary in progress. A truck is pulled over for stolen plates and officers question how it can start with a house key. A RV is no home for a family on the brink of falling apart.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A fight between siblings ends with a stabbing. Officers arrest a man after he attacks his brother and neighbour. Despite their no-contact order, police find a married couple in someone else's house.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A man is arrested for using his car to bully his wife and daughter. A drug dealer's getaway is foiled. Police resolve a bitter eviction dispute between a couple.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: Video footage reveals the actions of a woman's abusive boyfriend. Police track down a car chase suspect. A suspect plays coy about his crimes. A traffic stop reveals a vehicle with drugs.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Profiling the work of a high-speed police interception unit in Essex.

programme.title: All New Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Derbyshire police deal with around 350 fatal and life-threatening collisions a year, why they've happened and who is responsible can sometimes begin as a mystery.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: At Ticonderoga, Jamie and Claire prepare for an imminent British assault. Roger compiles information about time travel while Brianna earns the respect of her coworkers.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire help civilians flee Ticonderoga after the fort falls into British hands. Roger discovers the identity of the mysterious "Nuckelavee".

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie prepares to face British forces in battle. Roger and Brianna question Buck MacKenzie's intentions in the 20th century. William fights in the First Battle of Saratoga.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie fights in the pivotal Second Battle of Saratoga. Roger and Brianna search for Jemmy.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie, Claire, and Ian return to Lallybroch, Ian reconnects with his family in a time of need. Claire deals with the fallout from a long-held secret. Roger and Buck search for Jemmy.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Ian arrive in Philadelphia to help the ailing Henry Grey, Roger and Buck receive an unexpected clue in their search for Jemmy.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire turns to John Grey for comfort as they process difficult news; Ian and Rachel discuss their love and their future; Brianna confronts an intruder at Lallybroch.

programme.desc: Lord John Grey is put in a precarious position. William struggles to understand a surprising revelation.

programme.desc: Brianna fights against a dangerous plot threatening her family; Roger gains insight from an unexpected meeting; Ian and Rachel's relationship advances significantly.

programme.sub-title: Ye Dinna Get Used To It

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While on her second honeymoon, World War II nurse Claire Randall is mysteriously transported back in time to 1743 Scotland where she is kidnapped by a group of Highlanders and meets a young man named Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is taken to Castle Leoch, where she meets the Laird. As suspicions about her identity run high, Claire tries to blend in, and befriends the mysterious Geillis Duncan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Castle Leoch is readied for a gathering of the MacKenzie clan, Claire attempts to treat a young poisoning victim, placing her at odds with a powerful priest who demands to perform an exorcism.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire lays plans to escape during the Gathering, the rivalry between Jamie and Dougal intensifies.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As she accompanies Dougal on a trip to collect the rents owed to the MacKenzies laird, Claire witnesses brutality on both sides of the conflict between the Scottish rebels and the British royal army.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire and Dougal are brought in for questioning by a royal army commander, they come face to face with the sadistic Black Jack Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie are thrown together in marriage, but as their emotional and physical relationship unfolds, deeper feelings arise. Claire is ultimately torn between two men in two very different times.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Frank desperately searches for his missing wife, while Claire tries to come to terms with her new marriage. Claire is faced with an emotional quandary as a life-altering opportunity presents itself.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and the Highlanders rescue Claire from Black Jack Randall. Back at the castle, politics threaten to tear Clan MacKenzie apart and Jamie's scorned lover, Laoghaire, attempts to win him back.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.sub-title: By The Pricking Of My Thumbs
programme.desc: Jamie hopes the newly arrived Duke of Sandringham will help lift the price from his head, while Claire attempts to save an abandoned child.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Geillis are on trial for witchcraft, while Jamie manages to rescue Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Claire and Jamie make their way to Lallybroch, Jamie's family home.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie finds himself between a rock and a hard place when a redcoat deserter from his past resurfaces.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jenny set out to rescue Jaime from his redcoat captors. However, when Murtagh joins up, they turn to unorthodox tactics to send word to Jaime.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jaime awaits his death sentence at Wentworth Prison, while Claire and the Highlanders search for a rescue plan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A desperate plan manages to free Jaime, but his wounds are more than just physical. At a nearby monastery, Claire attempts to save both Jamie's heart and soul, as his mind lingers on the torture.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire must reconcile her future with the life and love she left behind. Shifting back to 18th century, Jamie, Claire, and Murtagh arrive on the shores of France.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Life in Paris is not without its trials as Jamie struggles to triumph over the traumas of his past.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie's days and nights are dominated by political machinations, while Claire finds solace in her healing skills.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie throw an elaborate dinner party intended to derail investors in Prince Charles' war effort. Meanwhile, Claire reveals to Jamie that Jack Randall is alive.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Jamie and Claire attempt to extinguish the fires their dinner party ignited but their relationship is put to the ultimate test when the past rears its ugly head.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire devise a scheme to stop a wine deal which could fill the Prince's war chest. When Claire learns Jamie has gone back on his word, the couple are met with dire consequences.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is brought to L'Hopital Des Anges where doctors try to save her life and that of her unborn baby. King Louis asks Claire to judge two men accused of practising the dark arts - one an enemy, one a friend.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie call upon Jamie's grandsire, Lord Lovat, in an attempt to elicit support for the Jacobite cause.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie reunite with the Lallybroch and MacKenzie men during training. Meanwhile, an Englishman arrives in camp with new information.

programme.desc: Claire and the Highlanders are sent north after the Jacobite leaders decide to halt their march on London. A band of redcoats makes trouble for the Scots, leading to a most unexpected reunion for Claire.

programme.desc: As Jamie puts all of his efforts into turning the Jacobite army away from the impending slaughter at Culloden Moor, Claire attempts to comfort the sick Alex Randall.

programme.desc: Flashing forward to 1968, Claire reveals the truth about her parentage to her daughter. Back in the 18th century, the day of the Battle of Culloden has arrived.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After living through the Battle of Culloden, Jamie is at the mercy of British victors, until his past provides his only hope of survival. Meanwhile, Claire attempts to adjust to life in 1940s Boston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie leads a lonely life until Lallybroch is threatened by redcoats pursing the elusive Jacobite traitor. In Boston, Claire and Frank struggle to co-exist in a marriage haunted by the ghost of Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: In prison, Jamie discovers that an old foe has become the warden and has the power to make his life hell. Claire and Frank both put their best foot forward in marriage.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While serving as a groomsman at Helwater, Jamie is pulled into the intrigue of a British family. In 1968, Claire, Brianna and Roger struggle to trace Jamie's whereabouts.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna grapples with life-changing revelations and Claire must help her come to terms with the fact that she is her father's daughter. Roger brings news that forces Claire and Brianna to face a choice.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Trusting in Claire's knowledge of 'history', Jamie leads the Jacobite army into a critical battle with British opposition near the town of Preston.

programme.desc: Claire and the Highlanders are sent north after the Jacobite leaders decide to halt their march on London. A band of redcoats makes trouble for the Scots, leading to a most unexpected reunion for Claire.
